prompt: Determine whether the work meets the applicable code, spec, drawing, or manufacturer requirement.
scenario: In a T2 work setting, the evaluated element is E-102 Panelboard installation & makeup within 2.1 Electrical. The relevant subcategory is 2.1.1 Power Distribution. The work is being assessed at the rough-complete lifecycle state with source anchors NEC Art. 408, 110.26 (working clearance), 200.4.
title: T2 E-102 Code/spec compliance
